storyInfo: Yumen receives marching orders. Jun returns to the Judicial Review Office and discusses the past and the law with Chen Che. Ch'en's group reaches the top of the Sky Mirror Pavilion, and Mo Yi reveals the existence of Bu Fan. An unexpected figure appears.

attributes.content: <p=2>One day before the day of the full moon, Hour of Ssu</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: The aging general stands silently in the tent, like a brick on an ancient wall.
Behind him is the military map that he has drawn a thousand times in his mind. Before him is the faint silhouette of Baizao.
The rain of the heartlands is unfamiliar to one used to the sands of the frontier. The clouds hang low, suffocatingly so.
The general's thoughts drift away.
You are the new commander of Yumen, I take it.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: You can call me Shuo. My responsibility is to assist you in military matters, as well as kung fu instruction for the soldiers.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: I can take you around the base, if you'd like.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: You don't remember me?
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: I saw your name in the imperial court's announcement... what do you mean by 'remember'?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Never mind.
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: I don't need a guide. I've served in Yumen before.
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: I see. Forgive my impudence.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: It seems we are old comrades.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: The memories tend to fade after all these years on the border. Forgive me, if I've caused any offense.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Memories faded, I see... interesting.
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Get yourself warmed up. I want to spar.
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: You've had a long journey. You should rest; I would be happy to spar with you another day.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: I don't need to rest.
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: I want to get some exercise before dinner.
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: We should go no further, General.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: The supply lines and the troops' morale have been stretched to the limit.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: We cannot afford to be reckless when fighting demons. To push forward would be very risky.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: We're so close...!
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: It's already a remarkable victory, General.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: The demons of the north feed on the fear in men's hearts... this is the first time I've seen a general press on without fear, even with the entire army's fate upon your shoulders.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: There is nothing to fear!
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: These things have harmed our people, ruined cities and farms... I only wish we could have wiped them out in this battle!
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Give me twenty years, I swear, I will see all the demons wiped out!
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: I have no doubt you will, sir.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: I doubt anything under heaven could daunt you.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: What about you?
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: You seem indomitable, invincible...
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Have you ever been afraid?
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Transfer?
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: My appointment to Yumen was for a hundred years. It's time to leave.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: And the Sui Regulator didn't tell me anything about the personnel change? They are getting more and more out of line.
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: But why are you leaving now? Trouble is stirring in the northwest. We need you more than ever.
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Perhaps our time together has made you forget...
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: I've never held any official position in Yumen.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: Where are you going? Danyan? Michu?
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: I think I will be stepping away, fully, from my responsibilities.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: Why?
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Communications from the Candleholders watching the Tomb of Sui have become increasingly frequent. Its awakening approaches.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: It would not be appropriate for me to shoulder important responsibilities at this time.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: But Yumen is strong and well-equipped. It will perform its duty well, whether protecting Great Yan's northwestern border, or any other purpose.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: Where are you going, after you leave?
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: The jianghu world is big. There are plenty of places to go.
attributes.name: Chongyue

attributes.content: ...Report.
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Have the scouts returned?
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Not yet, sir.
attributes.name: Yumen Sentry

attributes.content: And we have received no instructions from Baizao in the past three days.
attributes.name: Yumen Sentry

attributes.content: The Sui Regulator should be communicating with Yumen, regardless of what is happening in the Tomb of Sui...
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Send out messengers—
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Sir! They're forcing their way in!
attributes.name: Yumen Sentry

attributes.content: What is the meaning of this?
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: General Zuo.
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: It is most irregular to invade my tent like this, even for the military supervisory censor.
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: On whose orders are you operating?
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: The Grand Commandant has sent me to question you on the unnecessary delay.
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: Ridiculous!
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Yumen has been on full alert since it received the order to mobilize. There has been no delay!
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Have you forgotten that Yumen received orders to arrive at Baizao by the last day of July at the beginning of the year, but arrived three days late? What is this, if not a delay?
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: Yumen was struck by a Catastrophe at the beginning of the year, and the repairs took two months! The imperial court must have known—
attributes.name: Yumen Sentry

attributes.content: Silence!
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Hmph... I take responsibility for Yumen's delay.
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Did you come to strip me of command, then?
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: You know the Grand Commandant thinks highly of you.
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: But it seems, now, that you do not trust the Grand Commandant.
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: Such words are inappropriate for a solemn place like this.
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Kindly instruct Yumen to travel twenty li in the direction of the Tomb of Sui.
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: Yumen is already as close as it is allowed to be under standby. Why should we approach any closer?
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: The situation in the Tomb of Sui is yet unclear. Are you saying that Yumen should attack?
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Your duty is to obey. There is no need to question.
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: What is His Imperial Majesty's will?
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Are you questioning your orders, General Zuo?
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: I cannot abide such questionable orders!
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: If you will not accept your orders, then I must ask you to leave this tent.
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: How dare you!
attributes.name: Yumen Sentry

attributes.content: Stop!
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: My presence here represents the will of the Grand Commandant.
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: All you need to do is obey. Even if His Imperial Majesty questions, he can find no fault in your actions.
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: The bestial Sui is awakening. War is inevitable. Do you still intend to defy orders and paralyze Yumen with inaction?
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: We are at a crisis. The lives of millions hinge on your decision—including your wife and son, who are still in the Baizao city.
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: How dare you?!
attributes.name: Zuo Xuanliao

attributes.content: Not us. You, General.
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: According to the estimates of the Ministry of War, Baizao will be doomed as long as you continue to defy orders, and Yumen remains unmoving.
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: There is no time. We will wait here until you have come to a decision.
attributes.name: Military Supervisory Censor

attributes.content: Does it look familiar?
It has changed, but it is still recognizable as the court that judges all matters under Heaven.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: Why have you come back at this time, when you have not done so for so many years?
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: I have an appointment I cannot miss.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: But you took the time to come to the Judicial Review Office. Did you want to see if your successors have disappointed you?
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: My views are insignificant. The Judicial Review Office should only think about not disappointing the people of Yan.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: One of the deputy ministers resigned recently. It's a shame—you would have liked her.
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: I hope she didn't resign because she was disappointed.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: Hard to say...
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: Do you still play the guqin?
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: Never forget the five sounds, for that they ensure proper virtue.' I have also been trying out new instruments recently.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: I see... more pleasant than studying the Laws of Yan, I expect.
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: It is an interesting discipline.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: I read the Basic Principles of the Laws of Yan that you left behind many times, but I could never understand the last third.
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: I spent so much time studying it that I almost failed my Ministry of Justice entrance exam. Maybe I would have become a Candleholder.
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: It took many years for me to understand... the justice that you wrote about lay beyond the mortal realm.
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: Just as one cannot draw what one has never seen, one cannot write about conscience that does not exist in their hearts.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: If justice is nowhere to be seen in the mortal realm, then one must consider—has someone blinded our eyes?
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: You still bear a grudge for what happened back then.
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: Should I not?
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: What about the people who died in the turmoil? The innocent souls who were dragged into the game? Should they bear a grudge against him?
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: Yes, they should.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: Then how do you seek a fair judgment for it?
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: You forget.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: Not one law of Yan was written for the sole purpose of resolving hatred.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: It is someone else who should be judged.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: Looks like you're not worried about what will happen to your brother in the Tomb of Sui. You're more worried about the judgment he'll receive.
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: Justice has never been concerned with life and death. He and I seek different things.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: You're right, but at a time like this... I can't help but feel...
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: Law and regulations were written by humans, but the supreme law in your heart that transcends the strife of the mortal realm... may never be found there.
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: But just this once... if the time comes that we put the sinner on trial, I will put you in the judge's chair.
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: You're correct.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: And it's been a long time since I judged anyone.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: I take my leave.
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: There's no rush, is there? Join me in a cup of mortal tea before you leave.
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: Oh?
attributes.name: Jun

attributes.content: It takes mortal hands to make and serve the best mortal tea, after all.
attributes.name: Chen Che

attributes.content: <p=2>One day before the day of the full moon, Hour of Yu</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: The Sky Mirror Pavilion is bigger than I thought... that's the sealed room on the top floor, right?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: How about someone knocks on the door and figures out how to open it?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: There's no one here. I think we're the first.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: There is one thing that I don't quite understand, Zuo Le.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: If the Grand Commandant is after the proxy's relic, I take it that he knows how to use it to neutralize the bestial Sui?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: He is one of the three Grand Ministers. If he made plans to obtain it, then he has certainly made plans to use it.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I even find myself wondering... if someone takes the opportunity to erase another proxy's name with the writing knife while Wang is fighting Sui...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: But what does all this have to do with Wei Yenwu?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: The Grand Commandant wouldn't have needed the writing knife if he was that powerful. He could have gone into the Tomb of Sui and killed Sui with his own bare hands.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: What ideas do YOU have, then?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I didn't really care about you and your official stuff, but I have a pretty good idea what's going on after listening to you guys talk.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Basically, the crown prince who went missing forty years ago after being suspected of staging a coup is back. Am I right?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Do not speak of it so casually!
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Gah, I'm not wasting my time arguing with you.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Basically, there's another direct descendant of the True Lung here in Baizao. That explains everything.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: What are you getting at?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Have you never heard of the special Originium under Baizao used to suppress Sui?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Miss Ch'en here is from Lungmen, so it's understandable that she doesn't know. But you two should... unless it's above your rank?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Do you mean...?
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: 'The Earth's blessings have granted this stone to its people; the Heaven's blessings shall bring an end to Sui.'
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: A legend associated with the Great Hunt. I thought it was a myth, maybe some kind of allegory...
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: All I know is that the Tomb of Sui was built around a special facility...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Alright, I guess you don't know.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Why do YOU know?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I guess the Sui Regulator left no record of who gave Yan this Originium either.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: It was our grandmaster, Ju's first friend, and the first Shanhaizhong.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: To be precise, it was a personal gift to the True Lung. Meaning—
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: What happened?
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Looks like the evacuation of the civilians is complete, and the plates are beginning to separate.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Time is short. We should retrieve—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: So you really made it here.
Who's—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: A figure approaches them from the other side of the corridor.
You... but how could it be—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: All districts have been fully evacuated, Your Imperial Majesty, and all the ministries are ready.
attributes.name: Imperial Guard

attributes.content: They await your command.
attributes.name: Imperial Guard

attributes.content: Tomorrow is the day of the full moon.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Imperial Guard

attributes.content: Very well.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Separate the plates.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Heaven and earth rumble in the setting golden sun.
The plates of Baizao begin to separate, starting from the outer areas, casting numerous shadows in the vast wilderness.
They are the legs that carry the city, and the foundation of its existence—
Shanshui, Changjie, Yanhuo, Xiange;
Duanfang, Baigu, Zaifu, Bingge...
The Eight Districts have seen a hundred springs and autumns together.
They have long been standing united, overcoming hardships.
Now that they are separated, the future is uncertain.
I was wondering when you would come.
attributes.name: True Lung

attributes.content: Your Imperial Majesty...
attributes.name: Grand Commandant

attributes.content: It is time.
attributes.name: Grand Commandant
